name: Cleaning
tagline: Spotless homes and offices, on your schedule
description: Professional cleaning services for residential and commercial spaces. From deep cleans to regular maintenance.

faqItems.question: How long does a typical cleaning take?
faqItems.answer: A standard home cleaning takes 2-4 hours depending on the size of your home.

faqItems.question: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
faqItems.answer: Most businesses bring their own professional-grade supplies and equipment.

faqItems.question: Can I book recurring cleaning?
faqItems.answer: Yes, many businesses offer weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly plans at discounted rates.

name: Plumbing
tagline: Fix leaks, install fixtures, and prevent water damage
description: Licensed plumbers for repairs, installations, and emergency services. Available for residential and commercial properties.

faqItems.question: Do you handle emergency plumbing?
faqItems.answer: Many plumbers on SwingBy offer same-day emergency services.

faqItems.question: Are plumbers licensed and insured?
faqItems.answer: Yes, all plumbing businesses on SwingBy must hold valid licenses for Calgary.

faqItems.question: What's included in a plumbing estimate?
faqItems.answer: Estimates include labor, parts, and any applicable call-out fees.

name: Electrical
tagline: Safe, code-compliant electrical work for any project
description: Certified electricians for wiring, panel upgrades, lighting installation, and safety inspections.

faqItems.question: Do I need a permit for electrical work?
faqItems.answer: Many electrical jobs in Calgary require permits. Your electrician will advise on what's needed.

faqItems.question: Can you install EV chargers?
faqItems.answer: Yes, several electricians on SwingBy specialize in EV charger installation.

faqItems.question: How quickly can I get an electrician?
faqItems.answer: Most electricians can schedule within 1-3 business days, with emergency services available.

name: Landscaping
tagline: Transform your outdoor space into something beautiful
description: Lawn care, garden design, tree trimming, snow removal, and seasonal maintenance services.

faqItems.question: Do you offer snow removal?
faqItems.answer: Yes, many landscaping businesses in Calgary offer winter snow removal services.

faqItems.question: Can I get a full yard redesign?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Several businesses offer complete landscape design and installation.

faqItems.question: Is there a minimum job size?
faqItems.answer: Most businesses have a minimum of $60 per visit for basic lawn maintenance.

name: Painting
tagline: Fresh coats, clean lines, and a professional finish
description: Interior and exterior painting for homes, offices, and commercial properties. Color consultation available.

faqItems.question: Do you include paint and supplies?
faqItems.answer: Most painters include paint and supplies in their quote, but confirm when booking.

faqItems.question: How long does a room take to paint?
faqItems.answer: A standard room takes 4-8 hours including prep, two coats, and cleanup.

faqItems.question: Do you offer exterior painting?
faqItems.answer: Yes, many painters handle both interior and exterior residential and commercial projects.

name: Carpentry
description: Skilled carpenters for furniture building, cabinet installation, deck construction, and wood repairs.

faqItems.question: Can you build custom furniture?
faqItems.answer: Yes, many carpenters on SwingBy create custom pieces to your specifications.

faqItems.question: Do you handle deck construction?
faqItems.answer: Several businesses specialize in deck building, from design through completion.

faqItems.question: What types of wood do you work with?
faqItems.answer: Carpenters work with a range of woods from pine and cedar to hardwoods like oak and walnut.

name: Handyman
tagline: One call for all your odd jobs and home repairs
description: General repairs, assembly, mounting, and maintenance tasks. Perfect for the projects that don't fit one category.

faqItems.question: What kind of tasks can a handyman do?
faqItems.answer: Everything from TV mounting and furniture assembly to drywall patching and door adjustments.

faqItems.question: Is there a minimum booking time?
faqItems.answer: Most handymen have a 1-2 hour minimum booking to make the trip worthwhile.

faqItems.question: Can I book multiple tasks in one visit?
faqItems.answer: Yes, that's the best way to use a handyman. Create a list and they'll work through it.
